text:
> Install 4.0-RELEASE from CD.
> CVSup cvs-all and ports-all to RELENG_4.
> Install /usr/ports/x11/kde11
> Try to run "kdm -nodaemon".
Duh, forgot:  Insert "make world" after the CVSup.

--
Jeffrey S. Sharp   (XorAxAx)
jss@subatomix.com
